name: PRINCE2® Foundation
summary: Foundation-level certification in the PRINCE2 project management methodology, covering the principles, practices and terminology of structured project delivery.

name: PRINCE2® Practitioner
summary: Practitioner-level certification demonstrating the application of the PRINCE2 methodology to real-world project environments and governance.

name: APM Project Management Qualification (PMQ)
summary: Professional qualification awarded by the Association for Project Management, demonstrating broad knowledge of project management principles, governance, leadership, planning, risk and stakeholder engagement.

name: BA (Hons) English
summary: Undergraduate degree focused on critical analysis, research, communication and academic writing, graduating with Upper Second-Class Honours (2:1).

name: MSc Computer Science
summary: Postgraduate study focusing on software engineering, computer science fundamentals, cybersecurity and modern software development practices.
